name: Consult Schema
summary: Get the JSON schema for an artifact type
description:
Retrieve the schema definition for an artifact type. Returns the field definitions, validation rules, and lifecycle states for the specified artifact type. Use this to understand the structure of artifacts before creating or validating them.

Pattern: consult-schema - agent asks for schema, gets both structure and documentation.

artifact_type_id.description: The ID of the artifact type to retrieve (e.g., 'passage', 'hook_card', 'passage_brief')

include_examples.description: Whether to include usage examples in the response

include_validation_rules.description: Whether to include validation rules in the response

field_summary.description: Human-readable summary of required and optional fields

lifecycle_summary.description: Human-readable summary of lifecycle states and transitions

examples.description: Get the Passage Brief schema before creating one
